description: Returns the Recycled Checklist Sections from Checklists (Inspections) on the Project

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[list_id]
parameters.description: Return section(s) with the specified Checklist List IDs

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort item(s) by the chosen param; check below for a list of options. The direction of sorting is ascending by default; for descending sort, insert the - symbol before the param.

template_section_id.description: ID of Corresponding Checklist Template Section
